theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ p.Prime := by
  obtain ⟨p, hp, _⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  exact ⟨p, by linarith, by exact hp⟩

  apply Bool.not_not

theorem bool_not_not_simple (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  match b with
  | Bool.false => rfl
  | Bool.true => rfl

example (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  rw [← card_fin n, ← card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β]
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) (f : α → β) :
    ∃ x₁ x₂ : α, x₁ ≠ x₂ ∧ f x₁ = f x₂ :=
  Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt h f
after_snippet:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β]
    (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) (f : α → β) :
    ∃ x₁ x₂ : α, x₁ ≠ x₂ ∧ f x₁ = f x₂ :=
  Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt f h

  rw [hs, Finset.card_powerset]
  exact Nat.pow_finset_card_eq_card_powerset s
